prompt: Create a cinematic still from a Chinese historical drama showing the first meeting between a tall noble young man and a poor young heroine in an old village street. The male lead stands on the left, tall and elegant, leaning down slightly while holding the heroine's hand to help her up; he wears a flowing black hanfu robe with subtle dark-gold embroidered patterns, layered collars, a belt with hanging tassel ornaments, and long black hair tied half-up with an ornate gold hair crown. The heroine kneels or sits lower on the right, looking up at him while reaching for his hand; she wears worn beige-gray rough cloth robes with frayed edges, layered blue-gray trim, patched sleeves, and messy black hair tied in a simple bun with a pale cloth ribbon. Include exactly two human figures, both with their faces obscured by soft rectangular brown blur blocks, while their body language remains emotional and dramatic. Set the scene in a weathered ancient Chinese town with wooden buildings, pillars, shadowed doorways, baskets, muted fabric awnings, and a dusty stone or dirt ground. Use melancholic romantic tension, shallow depth of field, natural soft daylight, muted earth tones, realistic costume texture, high-end period-drama cinematography, 4:5 vertical composition, the noble man occupying the left side and the heroine lower on the right, no text, no modern objects, no watermark.
